prestazioni: Engine: Twin-turbocharged 2.0L V6 (H20A, 90° DOHC, 24-valve) with custom forged internals including JE Pistons 87mm forged slugs (9.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Tomei. Turbo setup features dual Garrett GT35R turbos (846517-5003S) with custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust manifolds by HKS, paired with a GReddy Type-S intercooler and 3-inch titanium downpipe.

Fuel & Ignition: Full sequential fuel system with dual Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors, and a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU managing a dual-stage nitrous oxide system (NOS 5184) with progressive controller. Ignition system upgraded to AEM CDI with NGK Iridium IX spark plugs (heat range 8).

Drivetrain & Suspension: Custom 4WD system with a Quaife ATB differential (front) and Cusco Type-RS LSD (rear), mated to a 6-speed sequential transmission (Holinger RD6) with a Tilton triple-plate carbon clutch. Suspension features Öhlins TTX40 coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping, custom spherical bearing control arms by Cusco, and a full polybush kit from SuperPro (P/N SPF1000K). Braking system includes AP Racing 6-pot calipers (CP8370) with 380mm two-piece rotors and Ferodo DS3000 pads.
estetica: Aerodynamics: Full carbon fiber body kit by Rocket Bunny (Pikes Peak Edition), including a 3-piece front splitter with integrated dive planes, oversized rear diffuser with Gurney flap, and a fixed rear wing (2.5m chord) with adjustable carbon fiber elements. Underbody features a custom venturi tunnel by APR Performance (GTC-3000).

Exterior: Full livery in Suzuki Sport’s 1998 Pikes Peak color scheme (white/blue/red) with custom vinyl wrap by 3M (2080-120 series) and sponsor decals (NGK, HKS, Öhlins). Lightweight carbon fiber hood with dual NACA ducts (for intercooler and brake cooling) by Seibon Carbon, and custom aluminum quick-release hood pins by NRG Innovations.

Interior: Full FIA-spec roll cage by Custom Cages (8-point, T45 steel) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360). Sparco Pro ADV seats with 6-point harnesses (Schroth Profi II), and a custom carbon fiber dashboard by Varis with AIM MXS Strada digital dash. Steering wheel is a suede-wrapped Momo Prototipo with integrated paddle shifters (Holinger).
